description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a prominent gable roof structure, featuring deep overhangs and a dark brown shingled finish. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally laid logs, giving the building a traditional, natural appearance. The front facade showcases a covered porch area supported by wooden posts, with multiple windows arranged symmetrically beneath the roof eaves. The cabin includes a main entrance door at the center of the front porch, flanked by windows, and additional windows are visible on the side elevations. The roofline is complex, with intersecting gables and a chimney protruding from one section. The overall design suggests a cozy, residential retreat suitable for wooded or suburban environments.
description: A rustic log cabin with a dark gable roof, covered front porch, and symmetrically arranged windows. The structure features intersecting gables and natural wood textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement beneath the main gable.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the front porch, entrance, and the side extension of the cabin with additional windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the log wall construction, a large window, and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back gable, a smaller covered area, and fewer visible windows.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with intersecting gables, deep overhangs, and dark shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on the front facade beneath the main gable, with additional single large windows on the sides; all windows are grouped and evenly spaced
attribute_door_placement: Single main entrance door centered on the front facade beneath the porch roof
